name: openai-models
description: OpenAI chat + embedding models (Chat Completions API). Bring your own OpenAI API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: OpenAI API Key
x-meta.help: Your OpenAI API key (platform.openai.com). Leave empty to fall back to the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: OpenAI model id. Empty = resolved from live /v1/models discovery.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional custom OpenAI-compatible base URL. Empty uses the OpenAI default.
